# VibeReference

> VibeReference is a curated prompt and tool library for vibe coders. Find battle-tested prompts, AI tool comparisons, and resources for building products with AI — organized by category and use case.

## Sections

- [Home](https://vibereference.com) — Browse all prompts and resources by category
- [Prompts](https://vibereference.com/prompts) — Curated AI prompts for building, writing, and designing
- [Tools](https://vibereference.com/tools) — AI tool comparisons and setup guides

## Quick Links

- Browse prompts: https://vibereference.com
- Build guides: https://vibeweek.ai
- Launch guides: https://launchweek.ai
- AI model comparison: https://llmreference.com

## Key Facts

- Free, no sign-up required
- Curated by Data Advantage for the vibe coding community
- Every prompt has been tested building real products
